key_insight: TO-Master uses an LLM agent to automate the full topology optimization workflow, from natural-language problem setup to finite-element solving and optimization.
engineering_relevance: It lowers the modeling barrier for structural and thermal topology optimization, making advanced TO more accessible beyond expert FEM workflows.
method: LLM agent parses user instructions and selects/coordinates computational tools.
Builds and checks FEM TO models, including meshes, boundary conditions, and typed solver arguments.
Supports generated or uploaded meshes, image-to-mesh conversion, compliance, thermal, multi-load, and stress-constrained optimization.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports benchmark reproduction, more complex engineering case studies, and an instruction ablation study showing that tool rules, reasoning guidance, and few-shot examples improve robustness.
watch_item: Performance still depends on correct tool orchestration and prompt design, so ambiguous inputs or invalid mesh/BC setups may require careful validation.
paper_title: TO-Master: an LLM-agent framework for automated topology optimization
